blocks.content: He called Eli that same night.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I've been waiting for this call.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: You don't even know what I'm calling about.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Kit. I have known you for fourteen years. I know exactly what you're calling about.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I need to come home without her knowing.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Done.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I want to film everything. The street. The field. The diner. I want to get Mrs. Jones on camera. Savannah. Maybe my mom.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I'll handle Mrs. Jones. She's going to cry.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I know.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I might cry.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I know that too.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: When.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: October break. Four days. I'm going to tell Daisy I'm staying in LA to work on a project.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: That's not a total lie.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: No. It's not.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Kit.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Yeah.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I'm proud of you. In advance. Whatever this ends up being — I'm proud of you for doing it on purpose.
On purpose. He held that for a second.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: That's the whole thing, isn't it. Doing it on purpose.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Always has been.
